hero.subtext: We're Gembaloft — a software, consulting, and network solutions team that maps your reality before proposing anything. Custom development, BI, AI, IT consulting, and infrastructure. All under one roof.

mission.label: — Our mission
mission.body_1: Most tech projects fail because they're designed from assumptions. We go to the source — your workflows, your team, your real constraints — and build from there. Software, consulting, infrastructure: same philosophy.
mission.body_2: We show up where the work happens. We don't propose from a slide deck — we build from ground truth.

items.title: Software Solutions
items.description: Custom development, Business Intelligence, and AI-powered tools built around your actual processes. Web apps, APIs, data dashboards, and machine learning — none of it from a template.

items.title: IT & Business Consulting
items.description: We diagnose your systems, map your workflows, and design the strategy that removes bottlenecks before they become problems. From IT roadmaps to full process systematization.

items.title: Network Solutions
items.description: Infrastructure design, deployment, and ongoing support — from office networks to cloud connectivity. Reliable, segmented, and built to scale without surprises.

process.label: — How we work
process.subtitle: A disciplined process built on observation, not assumption.

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: We go to your place of work. We observe, ask, and understand before we propose a single solution.

steps.title: Define
steps.description: Scope, stack, and roadmap built around reality — not templates or assumptions.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Iterative delivery with your team in the loop at every stage. No surprises.

steps.title: Ship
steps.description: Production-ready, documented, and maintained. Delivered in weeks, not quarters.

cases.title: Logistics Operations Platform
cases.outcome: Automated dispatch and inventory workflows for a regional distributor, cutting operational overhead by 40%.

cases.title: Executive BI Dashboard
cases.outcome: Unified real-time KPI visibility across 6 departments, replacing weekly manual reporting cycles.

cases.title: Process Systematization
cases.outcome: Mapped and automated 14 manual workflows, saving 20+ hours per week across operations teams.

cases.title: Multi-Site Network Upgrade
cases.outcome: Deployed redundant, segmented infrastructure across 3 office locations with zero-downtime migration.

items.title: One team, three disciplines
items.description: Software, consulting, and networking under one roof — no subcontracting, no handoff gaps. We own the full scope.

items.title: Process-first thinking
items.description: We map your workflows before recommending any solution. The result is technology that fits your operation — not the other way around.

items.title: LATAM-based, global-ready
items.description: Timezone-aligned with the Americas, cost-efficient, and built for long-term partnership.

cta.label: — Let's build
cta.body: Tell us about your challenge. We'll show up.

footer.tagline_2: Software solutions grounded in your reality.
